pageDescription: Calculate your monthly rent payments and affordability with comprehensive analysis including utilities, deposits, and rental market comparisons

placeholders.petFees: Enter pet fees or monthly pet rent

affordability.title: Rent Affordability
affordability.description: Financial experts recommend spending no more than 30% of gross income on housing

costs.title: Additional Rental Costs
costs.description: Utilities, renter's insurance, and deposits can significantly increase total housing costs

comparison.title: Market Comparison
comparison.description: Research comparable rentals in the area to ensure fair pricing

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides rent affordability estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual rental costs may vary based on location, property condition, and market conditions

importantNotesList: Factor in utilities which can vary significantly by location and season
Security deposits are typically equivalent to one month's rent
Renter's insurance is often required and costs $15-30 per month
Consider proximity to work and transportation costs when evaluating affordability

messages.enterInformation: Enter your rental information to calculate affordability
messages.resultMessage: Your rent calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides rent affordability estimates based on general financial guidelines. Actual rental costs may vary based on location, property condition, lease terms, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized rental affordability analysis and housing advice, consult housing counselors or financial advisors with expertise in rental markets and individual financial circumstances.

errors.monthlyIncome: Please enter a valid monthly gross income
errors.otherMonthlyDebts: Please enter valid other monthly debt payments
errors.rentAmount: Please enter a valid monthly rent amount
errors.utilities: Please enter valid monthly utility costs
errors.rentersInsurance: Please enter valid monthly renter's insurance
errors.securityDeposit: Please enter a valid security deposit amount
errors.leaseTerm: Please enter a valid lease term
errors.petFees: Please enter valid pet fees or monthly pet rent

tooltips.monthlyIncome: Your total monthly gross income before taxes
tooltips.otherMonthlyDebts: Total monthly payments for all other debts (car loans, student loans, credit cards, etc.)
tooltips.utilities: Estimated monthly costs for electricity, gas, water, internet, etc.
tooltips.rentersInsurance: Monthly cost of renter's insurance policy
tooltips.securityDeposit: Upfront deposit typically equivalent to one month's rent
tooltips.leaseTerm: Length of rental agreement in months
tooltips.petFees: Additional fees or monthly charges for pets

include_credit_cards_car_loans_student_l: Include credit cards, car loans, student loans, and other monthly debt payments
percentage_of_income_for_all_debts_typic: Percentage of income for all debts (typically 36-40%)
total_debt_payments_should_not_exceed_26: • Total debt payments should not exceed
consider_additional_costs_like_utilities: • Consider additional costs like utilities, insurance, and maintenance
enter_your_income_and_debt_information_t: Enter your income and debt information to see your results
if_annual_income_monthly_income_annual_i: If annual income: Monthly Income = Annual Income ÷ 12
if_monthly_income_monthly_income_monthly: If monthly income: Monthly Income = Monthly Income (as entered)
rent_backend_backend_ratio_monthly_incom: Rent (Back-end) = (Back-end Ratio × Monthly Income) - Monthly Debts
maximum_rent_minfrontend_limit_backend_l: Maximum Rent = min(Front-end Limit, Back-end Limit)
if_the_result_is_negative_the_affordable: If the result is negative, the affordable rent is set to $0
